title: monetary policy implementation / reserve requirements / floor system | Research Paper | Divorcing Money from Monetary Policy
summary: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York released a press notice on August 6, 2008 announcing a forthcoming Economic Policy Review article by Todd Keister, Antoine Martin, and James McAndrews examining how central banks can implement monetary policy by focusing on interest rates rather than money supply. The authors argue that paying interest on reserve balances at the target rate can create a 'floor system' allowing independent control of reserves and interest rate targets.
